name: 2pk Cardamine Wooden Dining Chairs Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add textural style to your dining space with the 2-Pack of Cardamine Wooden Dining Chairs from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This pack of two natural-shade dining chairs feature a woven seat for a traditional look. Made with an ash frame, this upholstered dining chair set features polyester seat cushions in white for comfortable sitting.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
